'''ngokashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:ejaculatory|ejaculatory]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-k-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ejaculatory|ejaculatory]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngokashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngokashithi|ngokashithi]] || [[word:ngokashiji|ngokashiji]] || [[word:ngokashishi|ngokashishi]] || [[word:ngokashiki|ngokashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngokashuthuthu|ngokashuthuthu]] || [[word:ngokashujuju|ngokashujuju]] || [[word:ngokashushushu|ngokashushushu]] || [[word:ngokashukuku|ngokashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngokashuthu|ngokashuthu]] || [[word:ngokashuju|ngokashuju]] || [[word:ngokashushu|ngokashushu]] || [[word:ngokashuku|ngokashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngokashufthuf|ngokashufthuf]] || [[word:ngokashufjuf|ngokashufjuf]] || [[word:ngokashufshuf|ngokashufshuf]] || [[word:ngokashufkuf|ngokashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngokashethe|ngokashethe]] || [[word:ngokasheje|ngokasheje]] || [[word:ngokasheshe|ngokasheshe]] || [[word:ngokasheke|ngokasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngokashothotho|ngokashothotho]] || [[word:ngokashojojo|ngokashojojo]] || [[word:ngokashoshosho|ngokashoshosho]] || [[word:ngokashokoko|ngokashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngokashotho|ngokashotho]] || [[word:ngokashojo|ngokashojo]] || [[word:ngokashosho|ngokashosho]] || [[word:ngokashoko|ngokashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngokashofthof|ngokashofthof]] || [[word:ngokashofjof|ngokashofjof]] || [[word:ngokashofshof|ngokashofshof]] || [[word:ngokashofkof|ngokashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngokashĂŻfthĂŻf|ngokashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngokashĂŻfjĂŻf|ngokashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngokashĂŻfshĂŻf|ngokashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngokashĂŻfkĂŻf|ngokashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngokashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|ngokashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngokashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|ngokashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngokashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|ngokashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngokashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|ngokashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngokashĂŻfthĂŻf|ngokashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngokashĂŻfjĂŻf|ngokashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngokashĂŻfshĂŻf|ngokashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngokashĂŻfkĂŻf|ngokashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngokashĂŻfthĂŻf|ngokashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngokashĂŻfjĂŻf|ngokashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngokashĂŻfshĂŻf|ngokashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngokashĂŻfkĂŻf|ngokashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngokashĂŠthĂŠ|ngokashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ngokashĂŠjĂŠ|ngokashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ngokashĂŠshĂŠ|ngokashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ngokashĂŠkĂŠ|ngokashĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngokashathatha|ngokashathatha]] || [[word:ngokashajaja|ngokashajaja]] || [[word:ngokashashasha|ngokashashasha]] || [[word:ngokashakaka|ngokashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngokashatha|ngokashatha]] || [[word:ngokashaja|ngokashaja]] || [[word:ngokashasha|ngokashasha]] || [[word:ngokashaka|ngokashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngokashafthaf|ngokashafthaf]] || [[word:ngokashafjaf|ngokashafjaf]] || [[word:ngokashafshaf|ngokashafshaf]] || [[word:ngokashafkaf|ngokashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngokashasha|ngokashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngokashshĂ«asha|ngokashshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngokashroasha|ngokashroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngokashmuasha|ngokashmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngokashyaasha|ngokashyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongokashnkshĂ«asha|gongokashnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongokashnkroasha|gongokashnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongokashnkmuasha|gongokashnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongokashnkyaasha|gongokashnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngokakashasha|ngokakashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngokakashshĂ«asha|ngokakashshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngokakashroasha|ngokakashroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngokakashmuasha|ngokakashmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngokakashyaasha|ngokakashyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongokakashnkshĂ«asha|gongokakashnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongokakashnkroasha|gongokakashnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongokakashnkmuasha|gongokakashnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongokakashnkyaasha|gongokakashnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngekĂŠshasha|ngekĂŠshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngekĂŠshshĂ«asha|ngekĂŠshshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngekĂŠshroasha|ngekĂŠshroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngekĂŠshmuasha|ngekĂŠshmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngekĂŠshyaasha|ngekĂŠshyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongekĂŠshnkshĂ«asha|gongekĂŠshnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongekĂŠshnkroasha|gongekĂŠshnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongekĂŠshnkmuasha|gongekĂŠshnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongekĂŠshnkyaasha|gongekĂŠshnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngokfashasha|ngokfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngokfashshĂ«asha|ngokfashshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngokfashroasha|ngokfashroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngokfashmuasha|ngokfashmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngokfashyaasha|ngokfashyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongokfashnkshĂ«asha|gongokfashnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongokfashnkroasha|gongokfashnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongokfashnkmuasha|gongokfashnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongokfashnkyaasha|gongokfashnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
